payload.description: New York City Transit has farebox recovery ratio 0.25 for 2025 Mid-Year Forecast
New York City Transit has farebox recovery ratio 0.261 for 2025 Aug YTD Actual
New York City Transit has farebox operating ratio 0.347 for 2025 Mid-Year Forecast
New York City Transit has farebox operating ratio 0.35 for 2025 Aug YTD Actual

tool_args.label: FAREBOX RECOVERY RATIOS table

payload.claim_text: FAREBOX RECOVERY RATIOS table shows 2025 Mid-Year Forecast and 2025 Aug YTD Actual farebox recovery ratios for New York City Transit, Staten Island Railway, Long Island Rail Road, Metro-North Railroad, MTA Bus Company, and MTA Total Agency Average.
payload.statement: FAREBOX RECOVERY RATIOS table with 2025 Mid-Year Forecast and Aug YTD Actual columns

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.

tool_args.label: FAREBOX OPERATING RATIOS table

payload.claim_text: FAREBOX OPERATING RATIOS table shows 2025 Mid-Year Forecast and 2025 Aug YTD Actual farebox operating ratios for New York City Transit, Staten Island Railway, Long Island Rail Road, Metro-North Railroad, MTA Bus Company, and MTA Total Agency Average.
payload.statement: FAREBOX OPERATING RATIOS table with 2025 Mid-Year Forecast and Aug YTD Actual columns

warnings: claim.statement is accepted as passthrough, but prefer claim_text. Claim statement.
